The 2nd ODI of the Bangladesh Tour of Zimbabwe 2026 marks the start of a three match Odi series. These top-ranked white-ball teams, to begin with a strong squad, Zimbabwe cricket team focusing on balance and pace control. Bangladesh, led by Mehidy Hasan, rely on experienced player such as Litton Das to apply early pressure and dominate key phases.
